rationale.R1.2: The draft contains a material internal contradiction: it attributes the time-split protocol to Sheridan et al. 2024 as a first introduction, then immediately states time-based splitting 'has been the standard cheminformatics practice for over a decade.' Evidence cited does not reach the epistemic weight those phrases require.
